title: knesebeckia papillosa
intro: Knesebeckia papillosa, also known as Wolf's Bane, is a flowering plant belonging to the family Asteraceae, native to China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily its antiviral and antibacterial abilities. The plant is rich in compounds that have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, providing health benefits such as immune system support and protection against oxidative stress. Knesebeckia papillosa can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, to be used as a dietary supplement.
